message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - got the jalapeño corn dog copy in the doc. Leaned into the textural contrast, the way the cornmeal crust catches against the heat of the pepper. Curious what lands.
The cornmeal crust catching against the pepper heat - that's your lead. Everything else is just noise.
You're right - I buried it under three paragraphs of unnecessary context about regional spice traditions. Stripping it down now.
Good. Send it when you're done - I'll read it before the meeting.
That feels right - Margaret's instinct about leading with the texture thing is solid.
Stripped version goes to the meeting. Don't second-guess it - your instinct was right the first time.
